content.full_text:
March 2, 1992

Fair Political Practice Commission
Legal Division
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, CA 95804

Attention: Scott Sallaerin

Re: Mike Bluett

Dear Mr. Sallaerin:

This letter pertains to my client, Mike Bluett, of Marysville, Yuba County. Mr. Bluett intends to run for supervisor in Yuba County and as his wife is the elected assessor of the same county, he feels that there might be questions about conflict of interest in him being supervisor and his wife being an assessor.

It would be greatly appreciated if you would submit to this office an opinion as to whether you feel that there would be a conflict in this case.

If you do not, yourself, issue such opinions as a guideline, please let me know what agency, if any, on the state level that will or may issue such an opinion.

Your cooperation is greatly appreciated.

Very truly yours,

WILLIAMS AND WILLIAMS

MINNA WILLIAMS
